calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wayne Seto, in person, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court queries Mr. Seto regarding whether he has had any issues confirming his marriage. Mr. Seto reports that he and his wife were married in a foreign country and plan to move back to the United States. Mr. Seto provides oral testimony in support of his petition. The court advises Mr. Seto that even though it appears to the court that the petition was unnecessary to establish marriage, the court is sympathetic to his intention and will grant the petition.

The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is granted, and the order is signed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.
